message:
perf: Zero-copy optimizations to reduce allocations

wheel.zig:
- Replace 41 allocator.dupe() calls with const arrays for platform tags
- LINUX_X86_64_TAGS, MACOS_ARM64_TAGS, etc. are now static slices
- WheelSelector no longer frees borrowed platform tag strings

floatobject.zig:
- Remove double-copy for nan/inf strings (PyString.create already copies)
- Pass literals directly instead of duping first

h2.zig:
- Use empty string literal "" instead of allocator.dupe(u8, "")
